_schema.description: Part-to-whole dataset. Each segment is a mutually exclusive, exhaustive category that sums to the stated total.

fields.title: string — chart headline
fields.total: number — sum of all segment values (drives center display)
fields.segments[].label: string — display name (keep concise for label lines)
fields.segments[].value: number — absolute value in stated unit
fields.segments[].pct: number — percentage of total (0–100, must sum to 100)

_schema.replace: Swap segments[] with your categories. Ensure values sum to total and pct values sum to 100. Use 2–5 segments for best readability.
